title_en: 14 New Tools for Taking on the Great Outdoors Properly
title_zh: 14款户外用品，助你更从容地走进自然

paragraphs.en: Outdoor plans are getting ambitious. With airfares on the rise, it's time to explore the unknown in your own backyard and further afield. But as we're generally carrying more kit, and staying away longer, your gear has to keep pace—after all, if anything fails in the great wide open, it's unlikely you'll have a spare to fall back on.
paragraphs.zh: 户外计划正在变得越来越大胆。随着机票价格上升，是时候在自家后院乃至更远的地方探索未知。但由于我们通常会带着更多装备、停留更久，装备也必须同步升级——毕竟，在辽阔的大自然里，若有什么坏了，你很可能不会有备用品可以临时替代。

paragraphs.en: The adventure market is full of noise: "Military-grade," "expedition-proven," "built for the harshest environments." Many of these claims mean very little. After all, a cooler that keeps ice for five days sounds great until you realize you're carrying an extra 15 pounds to achieve this goal. This guide not only cuts through the hype and focuses on the gear that will serve you well in a pinch, it also makes sure you have as much fun as possible while enjoying the open skies, tree-lined trails, and sandy beaches.
paragraphs.zh: 冒险市场充斥着很多噪音：所谓“军工级”“远征验证”“为最严苛环境而生”。这些说法往往意义不大。毕竟，一个能让冰块保鲜五天的冷却箱听上去很诱人，却可能意味着你要多背15磅的负担。这个指南不仅穿透了这些炒作，专注于那些在紧急时刻真正有用的装备，也确保你在享受开阔天空、树荫小径和沙滩时，尽可能玩得更尽兴。

paragraphs.en: Here's our selection of flashlights, tents, kites, and cookers, not to mention a few surprises (a wheelchair-friendly shelter and a frisbee game from a camping chair brand). Good gear doesn't make you a better outdoorsperson. It just gets out of your way. These picks do exactly that.
paragraphs.zh: 这里是我们精选的手电筒、帐篷、风筝和炉具，以及几项意外惊喜（包括一款轮椅友好型避难所和来自露营椅品牌的飞盘游戏）。好的装备不会让你成为更好的户外爱好者，它只是尽量不干扰你的体验。这些选择正是做到了这一点。

paragraphs.en: Consisting of an innovative magnetic-closure sleeping bag, a self-standing, easy-open daypack, and a stylish three-person tent, this laudable, inclusivity-focused collection from The North Face is designed to remove friction points that can prevent people with disabilities from enjoying life outdoors. The freestanding tent is a generous size for a three-person design and comes with equal-length poles for fast, mistake-free pitching. The zippers also have extremely sensible oversized pull tabs, while the low threshold and huge 68.2-square-foot vestibule is big enough to keep two mobility devices safe, dry, and close by.
paragraphs.zh: 这套令人称赞且以包容性为核心的 The North Face 系列，包含一款创新的磁吸式睡袋、一款可自立、易开启的日间背包，以及一顶时尚的三人帐篷，旨在消除残障人士在享受户外生活时可能遇到的阻碍。这顶自立式帐篷的三人空间比较宽绰，配有等长帐杆，可快速搭建且不易出错。拉链也配有非常实用的超大拉环，同时，低门槛和巨大的68.2平方英尺前厅足够大，能安全、干燥且方便地放置两辆行动辅助器具。

paragraphs.en: Traditional compact camping stoves heat water with ease, but when you want to do more than survive on rehydrated meals and instant noodles, this twin 4,600-watt burner setup gives you the freedom to get creative in your camp kitchen. Weighing just 1 pound, 10 ounces, and measuring 12 x 2.76 x 4.14 inches when folded, it’s easy to carry, the Piezo ignition is highly adjustable, and thanks to the serious power, you can boil a liter of water in just four minutes, or get your gnocchi simmering and parmigiano reggiano and sage cream sauce reducing in seconds.
paragraphs.zh: 传统的紧凑型露营炉子很容易加热水，但当你想在营地厨房里不只是苟且地吃泡饭和方便面时，这套双4,600瓦炉头让你拥有更多烹饪创意。它展开后仅重1磅10盎司，折叠体积为12 x 2.76 x 4.14英寸，携带很方便；压电打火点火火力可调性很高，而且凭借强劲功率，只需4分钟就能把一升水煮沸，或者几秒钟内就让意大利饺团和帕米吉亚诺•雷吉亚诺配鼠尾草奶油酱慢慢收汁。

paragraphs.en: In a sea of Arc’teryx shells and Salomon hiking shoes, Vancouver-based Uppervoid offers a timely new take on the gorpcore aesthetic. For something impressively original, check out the color grading on its new hardshell jackets, but for the warmer months, this ultra-lightweight windbreaker ticks our trail running boxes. Made from 3D-knitted Toray Airtastic 7D fabric, it is impossibly soft and thin, weighs just 2.8 ounces, yet feels reassuringly durable on the trails. Underarm venting helps heat escape when you start working hard, and it stuffs down so small you’ll forget it’s even in your pack.
paragraphs.zh: 在一片 Arc’teryx 夹克和 Salomon 徒步鞋的“潮流海洋”中，总部位于温哥华的 Uppervoid 为 gorpcore 风格带来了及时且新颖的诠释。若你想看些真正有创意的东西，可以关注它们全新硬壳外套的色彩分级；而在更温暖的季节，这款超轻型风衣也满足了我们对越野跑装备的所有期待。它采用3D 编织的 Toray Airtastic 7D 面料，触感细腻薄软到几乎不可思议，仅重2.8盎司，却在步道上摸上去依然安心耐用。腋下通风孔能在你加大体能输出时帮助散热，而且它可折得很小，小到你几乎会忘了它还在背包里。

paragraphs.en: Available in 35-, 45-, and 55-quart versions, Coleman’s ingenious collapsible hard-sided cooler expands or folds in seconds and brilliantly shrinks to one third its size for easy storage. Unlike most soft coolers, it still works properly, promising ice retention for up to 64 hours. Coleman also includes an antibacterial removable liner to keep your cooler stink-free, although be warned, without any wheels on the bottom, once the larger size is full of ice and drinks, it’s just as heavy as the competition to maneuver.
paragraphs.zh: 科曼推出了35夸脱、45夸脱和55夸脱三种规格的全新款可折叠硬壳冰桶，可在几秒内展开或折叠，收纳时体积可压缩至原来的三分之一，十分方便。与大多数软质冰桶不同，它仍然正常工作，并宣称可延长长达64小时的保冰时间。科曼还附带可拆卸的抗菌内胆，帮助你把冰桶的异味控制住；但要注意，底部没有轮子，一旦大号款装满冰块和饮料后，搬运时的重量就会和同类产品一样沉。

paragraphs.en: Billed as having Toyota Tacoma capability, Tesla range, and a Mini Cooper footprint, this 5-seat EV truck designed by Yves Béhar goes from 0 to 60 mph in 6 seconds and carries a 2,000-pound payload. It has a towing capacity of up to 6,600 pounds, too, while the configurable mid-partition can increase the bed size to accommodate 4 x 8-foot plywood sheets (or, indeed, 8-foot surfboards when the swell calls). Dual-motor versions target 0 to 60 mph in around 4 seconds, while the largest battery option teases up to 350 miles of range.
paragraphs.zh: 这款由 Yves Béhar 设计的五座电动皮卡被宣传为“拥有丰田塔科马的越野能力、特斯拉的续航表现，以及迷你库柏的占地面积”。它可在6秒内从0加速到60英里/小时，最大载重2,000磅；牵引能力也高达6,600磅，而可调节的中置隔断能扩大货箱空间，足以放下4 x 8英尺的胶合板（或者，在浪涌来临时放4片8英尺冲浪板也没问题）。双电机版本目标是约4秒完成0到60英里/小时加速，而最强电池版本则可提供最高达350英里的续航。

paragraphs.en: If you're concerned about performance off the asphalt, the MT1 has 10 inches (25.4 centimeters) of ground clearance and independent suspension, which means this compact EV carrier should have genuine off-road capability.
paragraphs.zh: 如果你担心离开柏油路后的表现，那么 MT1 的离地间隙为 10 英寸（25.4 厘米），并且采用独立悬挂，这意味着这款紧凑型电动车载具应当具备真正的越野能力。

paragraphs.en: With origins as rugged, “no-frills” military timepieces, field watches are ideal for the outdoors. This US-made 36-mm Vaer is rated for 100-meter water resistance, and with a durable single-dome sapphire crystal and 316L stainless steel casing, it’s properly durable, rather than being just military-inspired. It's also available in 40 mm, and if you don't like this khaki NATO, there's a solid collection of straps, including rubber, stainless steel, and leather, that can transition it easily from backcountry to boardroom. Its outdoor credentials are sealed by the fact that this watch is solar: Just six hours of sunlight will provide six months of power reserve, and it draws power from any light source (even candlelight).
paragraphs.zh: 源于坚固、实用主义的军用腕表，军规腕表非常适合户外场景。 这款美国制造的 36 毫米 Vaer 具备 100 米防水性能，并采用耐用的单顶圆顶蓝宝石表镜和 316L 不锈钢表壳，因此它确实是“经得住用”的，而不仅仅是军风外观。它也有 40 毫米版本；如果你不喜欢这条卡其色 NATO 表带，还有一组非常扎实的可选表带，包括橡胶、不锈钢和皮革，能让它轻松从荒野切换到会议室。它的户外可靠性还体现在这是款太阳能表：只需 6 小时日光即可提供 6 个月的续航，并且能够从任何光源（甚至是蜡烛光）获取能量。

paragraphs.en: Helinox has taken the same lightweight aluminum engineering that made its camping chairs famous and applied it to a series of fun and portable outdoor games. Packed into a small, transportable case, you’ll find two upright poles with stable, fold-out bases, two targets, and a flying disc. It’s simple, addictive campground fun built using premium materials. Other games in the Play collection include beanbag target game HeliDrop and StringTrees—Helinox’s backcountry twist on shuffleboard that gets suspended between tree trunks.
paragraphs.zh: Helinox 将其让人惊艳的轻量铝合金工程技术应用到了系列有趣且便携的户外游戏中，这项技术最初让其露营椅闻名于世。收纳进一个小巧可携带的箱子里，你会找到两根可立起的杆子、稳定的可折叠底座、两个目标盘和一个飞盘。它用优质材料打造出一种简单、上瘾的营地娱乐体验。Play 系列中的其他游戏还包括飞镖沙袋游戏 HeliDrop，以及 StringTrees——这是一种 Helinox 对飞盘掷靶（也就是卡拉什类桌面推盘游戏）的原始丛林改造版本，玩法是将其悬挂在两棵树干之间。

paragraphs.en: In a limited-edition color said to evoke the “serene power of an Alpine glacier,” this 6.3-ounce, classically styled but pared-back Swiss-made knife does away with dozens of tools, including the thingamajig for getting stuff out of a horse’s hooves. Instead, it focuses on a single, lockable 3.9-inch martensitic (highly magnetic and ultra-hard) stainless steel blade. You can open the blade easily with one hand, and the handle is made from ribbed aluminum for better grip, while a practical belt clip adds to the simple functionality.
paragraphs.zh: 这把限量配色版本的瑞士制小刀被称作“阿尔卑斯冰川的静谧力量”，重量仅为 6.3 盎司，外观古典却去除了多余功能。它舍弃了许多小工具，包括用于从马蹄里清理异物的那种专用器件。它改为只保留一把可锁定的 3.9 英寸马氏体（高磁性、超硬）不锈钢刀片。你可以用一只手轻松开启刀刃，手柄采用带肋纹的铝合金以提高握持感，而实用的皮带扣进一步强化了其简洁而高效的功能性。

paragraphs.en: The paracord pendant is a real outdoor boon: It can be taken off and used to rig up anything from animal snares to shelters, lash rafts, or, in a pinch, a tourniquet. When further unwound, the thin nylon strands also make good fishing line, sewing thread—even dental floss.
paragraphs.zh: 这款伞绳吊坠是真正的户外福音：拆下后可以改装成从捕兽套到临时避难所、扎制木筏，或者在紧急时当止血带。继续展开后，那细细的尼龙丝还可当作优质钓鱼线、缝纫线，甚至牙线。

paragraphs.en: When you’ve eaten all the carrots but still want to see better at night, you need this absurdly powerful flashlight with a staggering 23,000-lumen output from 16 LED emitters. With a range of almost one mile (1,553 meters), it’s a flashlight better suited for search-and-rescue teams than casual dog walks, but we’d be lying if we didn’t say we want one just for the outdoor fun of it all. An OLED display offers detailed battery and output information, while USB-C charging and IP68 water resistance make it more practical than many.
paragraphs.zh: 当你把胡萝卜都吃光了但仍想在夜里看得更清楚时，你就需要这款荒诞而强大的手电筒，它由16颗 LED 发光二极管提供高达23,000流明的亮度。其照射距离接近一英里（1,553米），更像是为搜救队设计，而不是普通遛狗时用；但我们如果不承认自己也想拿一支只为户外乐趣而用，那才不诚实。OLED 显示屏提供了详细的电池和输出信息，而USB-C充电和IP68级防水比许多同类产品都更实用。

paragraphs.en: Imagine the look on Peggy Jean’s face if Charlie Brown had rocked up at the park with this high-performance, dual-line stunt kite. Designed for precision and speed rather than simple flying, it has a lightweight carbon-fiber frame and highly responsive sail geometry, capable of fast turns, controlled tricks, and impressive stability in winds ranging from 3 to 25 mph. At 93 inches wide, it’s a statement in the sky, but rest assured, no matter the quality of Charlie’s aerial showboating, Snoopy will remain wholly indifferent.
paragraphs.zh: 试想一下，如果查理·布朗带着这款高性能双线特技风筝到公园来，佩吉·琼会是什么表情。它的设计偏重于精准与速度，而非单纯放飞，采用轻量化碳纤维机架和高响应性的风筝结构，可实现快速转向、可控技巧动作，在3到25英里/小时风速下也能保持出色稳定。它宽达93英寸，在空中极具存在感，但不用担心，无论查理的空中炫技水平多高，史努比仍会全然不在乎。

paragraphs.en: Positioned somewhere between an approach shoe, a lightweight hiker, and a lifestyle sneaker, the Jasper Zionic is having a moment. Cool collaborations with Gramicci, Snow Peak, and most recently, Pilgrim Surf + Supply have given it a fashion boost. But in truth, it’s just a hugely dependable, extremely comfortable design, whether you’re in the wilderness or popping out to Whole Foods. Sustainable credentials are also on point, with PFAS-free water repellency, ethically sourced suede uppers, and an outsole made from post-consumer plastic and agricultural waste.
paragraphs.zh: Jasper Zionic 介于涉野步道鞋、轻量徒步鞋和生活方式运动鞋之间，正在走红。与 Gramicci、Snow Peak，最近又与 Pilgrim Surf + Supply 的潮流联名，为它带来了时尚加成。但事实是，它无论在野外还是去 Whole Foods 都是超可靠且非常舒适的设计。它的可持续性表现也很到位：采用无 PFAS 的防泼水处理、道德采购的绒面革鞋面，以及由消费后塑料和农业废弃物制成的鞋底。

paragraphs.en: This is one of the first mainstream hiking packs to use Aluula, an ultralight waterproof material better known in niche thru-hiking circles than major outdoor brands. Weighing under 2 pounds, it’s a superb roll-top bag for those who want to travel light, and thanks to the V-shaped aluminum frame and padded hip straps, weight is distributed evenly for comfort. The waterproof bonded construction eliminates the need for a rain cover, while the GiddyUp compression system lets you cinch different sections down when not needed, even while wearing it.
paragraphs.zh: 这是第一批采用 Aluula 的主流登山背包之一。Aluula 是一种超轻防水面料，在小众的长线越野徒步圈里比在大牌户外品牌里更为人所知。背包重量不到 2 磅，是轻装旅行者的理想卷口袋型背包；得益于 V 形铝合金框架和加垫臀带，重量会更均匀地分散，穿戴更舒适。防水热压结构省去了另配防雨罩的需求，而 GiddyUp 压缩系统可以在不使用时把不同区域收紧，即使背在身上也能操作。

paragraphs.en: Don’t let young kids or a mountain of gear stop you from exploring further down the beach. This 110-pound capacity twin-motor electric buggy has a range of up to 8 miles, a top speed of a more-than-sprightly 4 mph, plus the reassurance of downhill braking to avoid potential dune-related disasters. Controls are all handlebar-mounted, and thankfully, given its bulk, the front wheels are removable, and it folds down to 37 x 27 x 17 inches for easier transportation.
paragraphs.zh: 别让年幼的孩子或一大堆装备阻止你走到更远的沙滩。它是一款承重 110 磅的双马达电动车，续航可达 8 英里，最高时速高达 4 英里/小时，而且配有下坡刹车，可避免可能发生的沙丘意外。操控都集中在车把上，而且值得庆幸的是，考虑到体积较大，它的前轮可以拆卸，折叠后尺寸仅为 37×27×17 英寸，便于携带。

paragraphs.en: This is a clever hybrid bottle designed for people who want hydration-pack convenience without committing to a full hydration vest every time they leave the house. This clip-on sleeve holds a soft 17-fluid-ounce flask but has been engineered to attach easily to your backpack straps for hands-free drinking on the move. At 2.8 ounces when empty, it adds barely any weight, while the neat compressible design shrinks as you drink to reduce liquids from sloshing.
paragraphs.zh: 这是一种巧妙的“混合式”水壶，专为希望获得水袋背负便利但又不想每次出门都穿全套补给背心的人设计。这款夹扣式套筒可容纳 17 液盎司的柔性瓶体，并经过工程化设计，可轻松固定在背包肩带上，让你边走边喝且双手解放。空瓶仅重 2.8 盎司，几乎不增加负担；同时，它采用巧妙的可压缩结构，随着饮用液体减少而自动变小，避免液体在里面晃动。
